PLAINTIFFS RAFIQUE MOHAMMED AND GUL KHAN'S Motion For Attorneys Fees Following Default Judgment And To Amend Judgment IS OFF CALENDAR FOR INSUFFICIENT NOTICE. NO OPPOSITION FILED. Judge: Peter J. Busch, Reporter: Carol A. Karen CSR# 8189 =301/PJB

CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Feb-24-2009 Off Calendar

Default Prove-Up Hearing.
Off Calendar Feb-03-2009 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES: Commissioner William Gargano, Clerk: Carla Contreras CSR: Lois Jones (Department 218)

Appearances
Plaintiff, Rafique Mohammed, is present.
Attorney, Andrew Martin Klimenko, is present representing the plaintiff.

Defendant, Nancy Leigh, is not present.
(Default was entered on 10/7/08 as to the defendant)

This cause came on calendar this day for a Default Prove-Up Hearing. Rafique Mohammed is sworn and examined by counsel.

After hearing the testimony and considering of the evidence presented, the Court rules in favor of the Plaintiffs and against the Defaulted Defendant, Nancy Leigh, as follows:

Defendant shall pay plaintiffs, as and for principal amount, the sum of $110,000.00, plus interest in the sum of $14,987.00, for a total Judgment of $124,987.00. Default Judgment by Court is signed in open court.

CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Dec-17-2008 Continued To Mar-06-09 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 212
